## Description

<!-- Describe what changed and why. Be specific and clear. -->

## Type of Change

<!-- Check the appropriate box -->

- [ ] `feat:` New feature
- [ ] `fix:` Bug fix
- [ ] `docs:` Documentation only
- [ ] `style:` Formatting, whitespace
- [ ] `refactor:` Code change (neither fix nor feature)
- [ ] `perf:` Performance improvement
- [ ] `test:` Adding or updating tests
- [ ] `chore:` Build process, tooling, dependencies
- [ ] Contains breaking changes (add `!` after type, e.g., `feat!:`)

## Checklist

- [ ] All commits follow [Conventional Commits](https://www.conventionalcommits.org/) format
- [ ] PR targets the `develop` branch (not `main`)
- [ ] Tests added or updated for changes
- [ ] All tests pass locally (`npm test`)
- [ ] Code follows existing style conventions
- [ ] No version bump in `package.json` (semantic-release handles this)

## Related Issues

<!-- Link any related issues: Fixes #123, Closes #456 -->
